title: Rename Go module + repo URLs to mandarnilange/corvee; add scripts/oss-sync.sh public-mirror copy tool

journal.note: Sweep: 164 Go files + go.mod + Makefile + 3 CI/lint configs + 2 JSON schemas + 6 markdown docs rewritten from legacy module path → github.com/mandarnilange/corvee. Private slug replaced with corvee in README, CONTRIBUTING, docs, and skills. GOPRIVATE hedge blocks removed since the public repo no longer needs them. New scripts/oss-sync.sh copies tracked files into a public-mirror checkout (dry-run by default, --apply to commit; built-in + .oss-exclude blacklists; post-copy leak check).
